task_description:
设计一个《无畏契约》(Valorant) 战绩分析网页的主页设计图，PNG 格式。要求包含：
1. 顶部导航栏（品牌 logo、菜单）
2. 英雄形象展示区（左侧放大显示当前选中英雄的高清图片和信息）
3. 战绩统计卡片（胜率、K/D 比、场次等关键数据）
4. 英雄列表（右侧显示可选英雄，网格或列表形式）
5. 整体色调：黑红配色（《无畏契约》官方风格），现代科技感
6. 目标分辨率：1920x1080，保存到 ~/Desktop/valorant_design.png

【重要】保存文件时必须使用实际路径：/Users/lzz/Desktop，禁止用 /Users/xxx/ 或 $(whoami)。

params.code:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont
import os

# 设置基本参数
WIDTH = 1920
HEIGHT = 1080
BG_COLOR = (15, 15, 20)  # 深黑色背景
PRIMARY_RED = (236, 26, 50)  # 无畏契约红
ACCENT_RED = (200, 20, 40)  # 深红色
TEXT_PRIMARY = (255, 255, 255)  # 白色文字
TEXT_SECONDARY = (169, 169, 169)  # 灰色文字
BORDER_COLOR = (236, 26, 50)  # 红色边框

# 创建画布
img = Image.new('RGB', (WIDTH, HEIGHT), BG_COLOR)
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)

# 尝试加载系统字体，如果不可用则使用默认字体
try:
    font_large = ImageFont.truetype("/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc", 48)
    font_medium = ImageFont.truetype("/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc", 28)
    font_small = ImageFont.truetype("/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc", 18)
    font_tiny = ImageFont.truetype("/System/Library/Fonts/Helvetica.ttc", 14)
except:
    font_large = ImageFont.load_default()
    font_medium = font_large
    font_small = font_large
    font_tiny = font_large

# ========== 1. 绘制顶部导航栏 ==========
NAV_HEIGHT = 80
draw.rectangle([0, 0, WIDTH, NAV_HEIGHT], fill=(10, 10, 15))
draw.line([0, NAV_HEIGHT, WIDTH, NAV_HEIGHT], fill=PRIMARY_RED, width=2)

# Logo
draw.text((40, 25), "VALORANT", fill=PRIMARY_RED, font=font_large)
draw.text((245, 35), "STATS", fill=TEXT_SECONDARY, font=font_small)

# 菜单项
menu_items = ["仪表板", "英雄", "战绩", "设置"]
menu_x = 800
for item in menu_items:
    draw.text((menu_x, 28), item, fill=TEXT_PRIMARY, font=font_small)
    menu_x += 150

# 用户信息区域
draw.text((1650, 28), "玩家昵称 | 设置", fill=TEXT_SECONDARY, font=font_small)

# ========== 2. 绘制左侧英雄展示区 ==========
left_section_x = 40
left_section_y = NAV_HEIGHT + 40
left_section_width = 700
left_section_height = HEIGHT - NAV_HEIGHT - 80

# 英雄展示框背景
draw.rectangle(
    [left_section_x, left_section_y, left_section_x + left_section_width, left_section_y + left_section_height],
    fill=(25, 25, 35),
    outline=PRIMARY_RED,
    width=3
)

# 英雄图片区域（模拟）
hero_img_x = left_section_x + 30
hero_img_y = left_section_y + 30
hero_img_width = left_section_width - 60
hero_img_height = 550

# 绘制英雄形象背景
draw.rectangle(
    [hero_img_x, hero_img_y, hero_img_x + hero_img_width, hero_img_y + hero_img_height],
    fill=(35, 35, 50)
)

# 英雄形象装饰线
draw.line([hero_img_x, hero_img_y, hero_img_x + hero_img_width, hero_img_y], fill=PRIMARY_RED, width=2)
draw.line([hero_img_x, hero_img_y + hero_img_height, hero_img_x + hero_img_width, hero_img_y + hero_img_height], fill=PRIMARY_RED, width=2)

# 英雄形象文字（代表高清图片）
draw.text((hero_img_x + 150, hero_img_y + 200), "◆ 英雄形象展示 ◆", fill=PRIMARY_RED, font=font_medium)
draw.text((hero_img_x + 120, hero_img_y + 260), "高清角色渲染 & 皮肤预览", fill=TEXT_SECONDARY, font=font_small)

# 英雄信息卡片
info_y = hero_img_y + hero_img_height + 30
draw.text((hero_img_x, info_y), "英雄代码名", fill=TEXT_SECONDARY, font=font_tiny)
draw.text((hero_img_x, info_y + 35), "REYNA", fill=PRIMARY_RED, font=font_large)
draw.text((hero_img_x, info_y + 80), "位置: 金牌 | 等级: 钻石 3", fill=TEXT_SECONDARY, font=font_small)

# ========== 3. 绘制右侧区域 ==========
right_section_x = left_section_x + left_section_width + 60
right_section_width = WIDTH - right_section_x - 40

# ========== 3a. 战绩统计卡片 ==========
stats_y = left_section_y
stats_height = 280

# 统计卡片背景
draw.rectangle(
    [right_section_x, stats_y, right_section_x + right_section_width, stats_y + stats_height],
    fill=(25, 25, 35),
    outline=PRIMARY_RED,
    width=2
)

# 标题
draw.text((right_section_x + 20, stats_y + 15), "本赛季战绩统计", fill=PRIMARY_RED, font=font_medium)

# 统计数据
stats_data = [
    ("胜率", "62.5%", right_section_x + 20),
    ("K/D 比", "1.35", right_section_x + 400),
    ("KAST", "71.2%", right_section_x + 750)
]

stats_line_y = stats_y + 70
for label, value, x_pos in stats_data:
    draw.text((x_pos, stats_line_y), label, fill=TEXT_SECONDARY, font=font_small)
    draw.text((x_pos, stats_line_y + 45), value, fill=PRIMARY_RED, font=font_large)

# 详细统计
detail_y = stats_y + 180
stats_details = [
    f"场次: 128",
    f"胜场: 80",
    f"最高连胜: 12"
]

for idx, detail in enumerate(stats_details):
    draw.text((right_section_x + 20 + idx * 300, detail_y), detail, fill=TEXT_SECONDARY, font=font_small)

# ========== 3b. 英雄选择列表 ==========
heroes_y = stats_y + stats_height + 40
heroes_height = HEIGHT - NAV_HEIGHT - 40 - stats_height - 40 - 40

# 英雄列表背景
draw.rectangle(
    [right_section_x, heroes_y, right_section_x + right_section_width, heroes_y + heroes_height],
    fill=(25, 25, 35),
    outline=PRIMARY_RED,
    width=2
)

# 英雄列表标题
draw.text((right_section_x + 20, heroes_y + 15), "主要英雄 - 点击查看详情", fill=PRIMARY_RED, font=font_medium)

# 英雄列表
heroes_list = [
    ("REYNA", "90.2%", "金牌", "当前"),
    ("JETT", "85.6%", "金牌", ""),
    ("RAZE", "78.3%", "白金", ""),
    ("SAGE", "72.1%", "白金", "")
]

hero_row_y = heroes_y + 70
for hero_name, wr, rank, tag in heroes_list:
    # 英雄行背景
    if tag == "当前":
        draw.rectangle(
            [right_section_x + 10, hero_row_y - 5, right_section_x + right_section_width - 10, hero_row_y + 40],
            fill=(40, 40, 55),
            outline=PRIMARY_RED,
            width=1
        )
    
    # 英雄名称
    draw.text((right_section_x + 30, hero_row_y), hero_name, fill=PRIMARY_RED, font=font_small)
    
    # 胜率
    draw.text((right_section_x + 300, hero_row_y), f"胜率: {wr}", fill=TEXT_PRIMARY, font=font_small)
    
    # 段位
    draw.text((right_section_x + 600, hero_row_y), f"段位: {rank}", fill=TEXT_SECONDARY, font=font_small)
    
    # 标签
    if tag:
        draw.text((right_section_x + right_section_width - 120, hero_row_y), tag, fill=PRIMARY_RED, font=font_small)
    
    hero_row_y += 55

# ========== 4. 底部装饰 ==========
footer_y = HEIGHT - 30
draw.line([40, footer_y - 10, WIDTH - 40, footer_y - 10], fill=PRIMARY_RED, width=1)
draw.text((40, footer_y - 30), "VALORANT STATS ANALYZER | Powered by Advanced Analytics", fill=TEXT_SECONDARY, font=font_tiny)
draw.text((WIDTH - 400, footer_y - 30), "Last Update: 2026-03-08", fill=TEXT_SECONDARY, font=font_tiny)

# 保存图片
output_path = "/Users/lzz/Desktop/valorant_design.png"
img.save(output_path)
print(f"设计图已生成: {output_path}")
print(f"分辨率: {WIDTH}x{HEIGHT}")
print(f"色调: 黑红配色 (官方无畏契约风格)")
print(f"包含: 导航栏、英雄展示区、战绩统计、英雄列表")
